predictions.description: A cultural tradition exists where parental discipline of children is publicly validated through gift-giving ceremonies, with implements of corporal punishment distributed as ceremonial objects.
predictions.source_quote: In Germany, Santa's servant Ruprecht gives presents to good children and whipping rods to the parents of bad ones.

predictions.description: Corporate safety improvements are funded by reducing worker compensation rather than adjusting consumer prices or executive pay.
predictions.source_quote: we've been able to increase safety here at the plant without increasing the cost to the consumer or affecting management payraises

predictions.description: Corporations prioritize maintaining executive compensation and consumer pricing over worker benefits when allocating resources for operational improvements.
predictions.source_quote: we've been able to increase safety here at the plant without increasing the cost to the consumer or affecting management payraises

predictions.description: Employers deduct multiple mandatory and discretionary fees from worker paychecks including social security, unemployment insurance, costume rentals, and seasonal training costs, resulting in substantial reductions from gross pay.
predictions.source_quote: $120 gross. Less Social Security, less unemployment insurance, less Santa training, less costume purchase, less beard rental, less Christmas club.

predictions.description: Seasonal workers in costume-based employment face fragmented income streams with employment gaps between seasonal contracts.
